intent: Announce the launch of a new product to existing customers
key_facts: Product name is 'ProAnalytics v2'
Available starting next Monday
Existing customers get a 20% discount for the first year

intent: Follow up after an initial sales discovery call
key_facts: Meeting was yesterday
Attached is the product pricing deck
Suggest a technical demo for next Wednesday

intent: Apologize for a recent unplanned service downtime
key_facts: Service was down for 2 hours on Tuesday
Issue was caused by a database migration failure
Will credit 10% of monthly bill to affected accounts

intent: Extend a job offer to a candidate
key_facts: Position is Senior AI Engineer
Starting salary is $150,000
Start date is expected to be within 4 weeks

intent: Request to reschedule an upcoming project kickoff meeting
key_facts: Current meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 10 AM
Need to move it because the project lead is out sick
Propose alternative times: Thursday 2 PM or Friday 10 AM

intent: Provide a weekly update on the mobile app project to stakeholders
key_facts: Phase 1 development is 100% complete
Beta testing will begin next week
Currently under budget by 5%

intent: Remind a client about an overdue invoice
key_facts: Invoice #4592 is 15 days past due
Amount owed is $3,500
Request immediate payment to avoid late fees

intent: Propose a strategic partnership with a complementary software company
key_facts: Our user bases have a 60% overlap
Proposing an API integration between our tools
Suggest a 15-minute introductory call next week

intent: Welcome a new user who just signed up for the SaaS platform
key_facts: Thank them for joining the community
Highlight the link to the 'Getting Started' video tutorial
Mention that support is available 24/7 via the in-app chat

intent: Say farewell to the team on the last day at the company
key_facts: Leaving the company after 4 wonderful years
Will be transitioning to a new role in a different industry
Share personal email (jane.doe.personal@email.com) and LinkedIn for staying in touch
